notes: v1.2.25: Rebuilt timeline with a simpler, more robust architecture that creates/destroys visible rows on each render instead of fragile object pooling. Fixed updater auto-exit bug (QTimer.singleShot from background thread was not firing; now uses pyqtSignal for reliable main-thread process termination). Fixed QSystemTrayIcon missing icon warning. Added exception logging around dialog add flow and timeline render for easier future diagnostics.
